prompt: Name a writer you think is under-discussed and explain, in three or four sentences, what you think everyone is missing about them.
response: I think Octavia E. Butler is an under-discussed writer. She is one of the first science fiction authors of African American descent and her work often explores themes of power, oppression, and identity. What many people may miss about her writing is its thought-provoking nature; she asks uncomfortable questions about society and challenges readers to think critically about the world they live in. Additionally, her stories often feature strong, diverse characters navigating complex and often fictional worlds, which adds depth and richness to her writing.
